name: improve_timing
short_description: Automatically place ports and leaf-level instances

improve_timing

Description: 
Automatically place ports and leaf-level instances

Syntax: 
improve_timing  [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Tools
